shared_properties: All card frames use the 80x120 px hand size described by the GDD and preserve a legible center art window plus bottom cost gem area.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while rarity and hover colors appear inside specs.colors_hex.
Frames are authored for transparent background compositing on the lower card row.
differences: The sheet contains normal, hover, use, discard, and rare card frame variants for quick UI state swaps.
Hover uses a brighter gold edge, use introduces a cyan cast line, discard pushes the frame into a desaturated silver treatment, and rare adds a purple inner rim.
Each frame reserves the same title, art, and cost zones so gameplay layout stays stable while states change.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load hand_card_frame_sheet.png during Loading and build a 5x1 atlas for card state swaps in the hand UI.
runtime_notes: Map frame order to normal, hover, use, discard, and rare states so UI code can stay deterministic.
Keep inner safe margins identical across all frames to avoid text jitter.
Use nearest or linear sampling consistently with the chosen UI scaling mode so 2 px borders stay sharp.

context.usage: Lower hand row UI sheet for up to five card slots during active combat.

layout_notes: Reserve an inner art window of 64x70 px.
Reserve a top title zone of 64x14 px.
Reserve a bottom cost gem zone centered in the final 18 px of height.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 400x120 px for five 80x120 frames with no frame gutter.
All five frames preserve identical title, art, and cost safe zones.
Hover, use, discard, and rare states remain distinguishable in grayscale silhouette plus accent distribution.
